    "Break flange joint and rotate spool to achieve correct two-hole alignment per iso drawing",

  "rationale": "Flange bolt holes must straddle the centerlines (two-holing) per standard practice and project iso drawings to ensure proper alignment and stress distribution. The observed misalignment is a non-compliant installed-defective condition that must be corrected before the work can be accepted. The spool is roughed in but not closed out, so rework is required.",
